svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ ANCHOR-FREE vs ANCHOR-BASED │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
ANCHOR-BASED (YOLO, Faster R-CNN): ───────────────────────────────── • Predefined anchor boxes at each location • Predict offsets from anchors • Hyperparameters: sizes, ratios
ANCHOR-FREE (FCOS, CenterNet): ──────────────────────────── • Predict directly from feature map points • No anchor hyperparameters • Simpler, often faster
FCOS Prediction: ──────────────── At each feature map location (x, y): • Predict distances: (l, t, r, b) to box edges • Predict class scores • Predict centerness (quality score)
┌─────────────────┐ │ t │ │ ┌───────┐ │ │ l │ ● │ r │ │ └───────┘ │ │ b │ └─────────────────┘
Box = (x-l, y-t, x+r, y+b)
